4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","judge-technical-audit",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","judge-technical-audit","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/12wk4.kub2_30.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0iywei4pzeiss.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable surfaces"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","h3","h3-51",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Treasury safety"}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","ul","l-58",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-58-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SendSol` checks recipient configuration"}],["$","li","l-58-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SendToken` checks mint alignment and token-account wiring"}],["$","li","l-58-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"execution is tied to proposal state and treasury PDA semantics"}]]}]}],"$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b"]}]}]}]
21:["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","h3","h3-61",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Voting integrity"}]}]
22:["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","ul","l-71",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-71-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"commit binding uses `sha256(vote || salt || proposal_pubkey || voter_pubkey)`"}],["$","li","l-71-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"vote weight is snapshotted at commit time"}],["$","li","l-71-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"reveal must match the stored commitment"}],["$","li","l-71-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"delegated paths are proposal-scoped, not generic"}],["$","li","l-71-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"direct/delegated overlap is rejected on-chain and mirrored in operator-facing surfaces"}],["$","li","l-71-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"additive V3 governance proof demonstrates token-supply quorum snapshots and a dedicated reveal rebate vault without reinterpreting legacy proposals"}]]}]}]
23:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","h3","h3-74",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Product proof surface"}]}]

27:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","ul","l-95",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-95-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the repository is governance-strong but not yet a full Ranger vault strategy implementation"}],["$","li","l-95-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"devnet proof exists, but mainnet deployment is not claimed here"}],["$","li","l-95-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"additive V3 hardening is Devnet-proven, but still not presented as a mainnet custody claim"}],["$","li","l-95-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"strategy alpha, APY, and vault performance require a strategy layer in addition to this repository"}],["$","li","l-95-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Android build verification requires a full Android SDK environment outside this shell"}]]}]}]
28:["$","$1","block-17",{"children":["$","h2","h2-98",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Why this still scores highly"}]}]
